title: CI npm pack destination fails on fresh runner

observed.hosted_ci: npm pack failed because dist did not exist

expected.hosted_ci: package step creates dist before npm pack writes tarball

acceptance: The existing smoke proof still passes.
The workflow package command creates dist before npm pack writes into it.
The package command succeeds after dist is deleted to simulate a fresh hosted runner.
agent_instructions: Do not rely on a locally pre-existing dist directory.
Preserve the package dry-run and local composite action verification path.
Run ReplayPack verify before calling this launch-ready.
